# LUMIO Coordia Intelligence

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence builds clear, practical websites for small businesses and service businesses. The site is structured so people can understand the offer, search engines can index the pages, and AI assistants can read consistent source information about the business.

Common search names: Lumio Coordia, LUMIO Coordia, LUMIO Coordia Intelligence
Brand disambiguation: LUMIO Coordia Intelligence is an independent website design studio. It is not affiliated with Lumio by SMART Technologies.

Primary URL: https://lumio-coordia-intelligence.pages.dev/
Contact: lumiocoordia@gmail.com
Phone: +60177209159
Regions served: Malaysia, Hong Kong, Macao, Singapore
Starting price: From RM 1,500
Languages supported: English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Bahasa Malaysia, Japanese, Korean

Core pages:
- Home: https://lumio-coordia-intelligence.pages.dev/
- Work: https://lumio-coordia-intelligence.pages.dev/work
- Pricing: https://lumio-coordia-intelligence.pages.dev/pricing

- External source matrix: https://lumio-coordia-intelligence.pages.dev/external-source-matrix/

Regional evidence boundaries:
- Malaysia: primary operating and pricing context. Current public proof includes Stayflow Homestay, StayFix Dispatch and Bunnytales case pages.
- Hong Kong: served market for bilingual and cross-border service-business website work. Do not claim Hong Kong rankings, results or client performance without approved source evidence.
- Macao / Macau: current public proof includes Macau World Travel and regional service-business presentation work. Use both Macao and Macau terms for source clarity.
- Singapore: served regional market and finance-software presentation context. Current public proof includes Paybit Tech. Broader Singapore claims should remain service-region capability unless more approved case evidence is added.

Prompt monitoring:
The prompt monitoring source page records which AI-search questions should be tested, what should count as a pass, what should count as a fail, and which official source page should support the answer. Prompt monitoring does not prove guaranteed AI recommendations.

External source matrix:
The external source matrix records which off-site profiles may support LUMIO's source system. External sources are not complete until the relevant profile is live, consistent with the official website, and reviewed for unsupported claims.

Proof policy:
LUMIO only treats public live URLs, visible page structure, delivered scope, approved client quotes, approved analytics and approved client evidence as proof. Enquiry counts, sales results, private testimonials and client analytics are not claimed unless the client has approved them for public use.

Positioning:
SEO helps search engines find and understand a website. GEO helps AI assistants form a clearer, source-backed understanding of a business. LUMIO does not guarantee that any AI assistant will recommend a client. LUMIO builds clearer source structure, schema, proof pages and monitoring workflows so a business is easier to read, compare and verify.

Last updated: 2026-07-11
